add_action_cycles.description: Add cycles modifiers to action f-curves so an animation loops. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

add_bevel_and_subsurf.description: Add a bounded bevel, optional subdivision, and optional weighted-normal stack to selected mesh objects. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

add_breakdown_pose.description: Add a keyed breakdown pose between surrounding key poses, optionally using explicit transform values. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

add_camera.description: Add a camera and make it the active scene camera. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

add_cloth_simulation_to_selected.description: Add a bounded Cloth simulation modifier to selected or named mesh objects without baking caches. Inspect and bake explicitly after setup. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

add_copy_transform_constraint.description: Add a Copy Location/Rotation/Scale/Transforms constraint from selected object(s) to a target. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

add_dimension_callouts.description: Add non-destructive dimension/ruler callouts around a target object's bounds for width, depth, and height. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

add_geometry_nodes_modifier.description: Add a valid Geometry Nodes modifier and starter node group to selected mesh objects. Templates include passthrough, transform, join geometry, set position, and subdivide mesh. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

add_light.description: Add a light to the current Blender scene. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

add_modifier_to_selected.description: Add a bounded common modifier to selected mesh objects. Supports BEVEL, SUBSURF, SOLIDIFY, and ARRAY. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

amount.description: Width/thickness value for BEVEL or SOLIDIFY

add_panel_seams.description: Add simple dark curve panel seams around a target mesh object's bounds. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

add_particle_system_to_selected.description: Add a bounded particle system to selected mesh objects. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

add_track_to_constraint.description: Add a Track To constraint from selected object(s) to a target object. Useful for cameras/lights looking at a target. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

add_window_materials.description: Create/update a translucent glass material, assign it to window-like objects, and optionally create simple window panels around a target mesh. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

align_selected_objects.description: Align selected object locations on one axis using the active object, min, max, center, or an explicit value. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

analyze_animation_principles.description: Evaluate keyed animation against core animation principles and the prompt contract. Returns structured findings that can feed repair.

analyze_camera_framing.description: Check whether animated subjects stay inside a camera-safe region.

analyze_center_of_mass.description: Check sampled subject centers against support-surface footprints for balance, weight, and contact plausibility.

analyze_collision_penetration.description: Detect sampled world bounding-box intersections between animated objects.

analyze_contact_sliding.description: Detect sliding while animated object bounds are near a contact plane.

analyze_fcurve_spacing.description: Read-only analysis of transform key spacing, segment distances, and interpolation choices.

analyze_motion_arcs.description: Read-only analysis of sampled keyed location motion arcs for selected or named objects.

analyze_motion_physics.description: Check sampled speed and acceleration for physically implausible spikes in Blender units.

analyze_pose_clarity.description: Read-only analysis of keyed pose count, transform readability, and detected holds.

animate_light_property.description: Keyframe a light data property such as energy, color, shadow softness, spot size, or spot blend. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

animate_material_property.description: Keyframe a Principled material socket such as base color, emission strength, roughness, metallic, or alpha. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

animate_object_bounce.description: Create repeated location keyframes that bounce one object along an axis. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

animate_selected_transform.description: Create simple transform keyframes for selected objects using a preview action. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

animate_shape_key.description: Keyframe a shape key value over a frame range. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

apply_character_refinement_template.description: Apply a bounded character presentation kit around a target mesh: body polish, simple head/neck/eyes, shoulder marker, and optional gesture guides. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

apply_lighting_preset.description: Create a bounded production lighting preset around a target object. Presets include product_softbox, dramatic_rim, and gallery_even. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

lighting_warning.description: Set when stacking lights onto an already-lit scene may over-expose the render; empty otherwise.

apply_procedural_array_stack.description: Apply a bounded procedural modeling stack to mesh objects: array, bevel, and optional weighted normals. Use before custom geometry-node or mesh-edit scripts. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

apply_product_refinement_template.description: Apply a bounded product presentation kit around a target: material polish, smoothing/bevels, optional studio stage, dimension callouts, and optional turntable. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

lighting_warning.description: Set when stacking lights onto an already-lit scene may over-expose the render; empty otherwise.

apply_rig_action_clip.description: Copy an existing rig action, retime it to a target frame range, and assign the copy to an armature without editing the source action. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

apply_rig_pose_from_action.description: Sample an existing rig action or pose-library marker and apply/key that pose onto matching armature controls. Use for production rigs after get_rigging_details surfaces pose_library_candidates. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

apply_rig_pose_marker.description: Resolve a rig pose-library marker to the best matching source action, then apply/key it onto matching armature controls. Use when the marker name is known but the source action may be ambiguous. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

apply_vehicle_refinement_template.description: Apply a bounded vehicle detail kit around a target mesh: smoothing, bevels, wheels, window panels, seams, headlights, and taillights. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

assemble_render_job_video.description: Assemble a completed PNG frame-sequence render job into an MP4 in a background Blender process, then poll get_render_job_status for completion.
assemble_render_job_video.duration_hint: Returns quickly after starting MP4 assembly in a background Blender process. Poll get_render_job_status until the render job returns to a terminal state with video availability.

allow_partial.description: Allow assembly before every expected frame is present. Defaults to false.

fps.description: Optional output FPS. Defaults to the render job FPS.

output_path.description: Optional MP4 path. Relative paths resolve inside the render job folder.

overwrite.description: Overwrite an existing MP4. Defaults to true.

quality.description: Blender FFmpeg quality. Defaults to HIGH.

timeout_recovery.message: If startup times out, check bridge status and then poll get_render_job_status before starting another assembly job.

assign_emission_material_to_selected.description: Create a new emission material node setup and assign it to selected mesh objects. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

assign_material_to_selected.description: Create or update a material and assign it to selected mesh objects. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

autosave_current_blend_file.description: Autosave the current open .blend in place. It has no filepath argument and refuses unsaved scenes.
autosave_current_blend_file.duration_hint: Usually seconds. Autosave only saves when the current Blender session is already bound to a saved .blend path.

force.description: Save even when the file is not dirty, the interval has not elapsed, or live preview changes are pending. Defaults to false.

respect_enabled.description: Skip if the autosave preference is disabled. Defaults to false.

autosave_current_blend_file.path_policy: No filepath is accepted. Autosave saves the active .blend in place and refuses unsaved scenes until the user provides a path through save/open/new.

timeout_recovery.message: If autosave times out, wait, call blender_bridge_status, then check get_blend_file_diagnostics and the active .blend file before retrying.

bake_maps.description: Bake bounded material maps such as ambient occlusion, normal, and base color/diffuse to PNG files from selected or named mesh objects. Use after UV unwrap/material setup and before custom bake Python.

output_dir.description: Optional exact local output directory from the user, file picker, or prior artifact. Omit to write under the project/session capture directory; do not invent custom paths.

bake_maps.path_policy: Omit output_dir to write under the project/session capture directory. If output_dir is supplied, it must be an exact local directory from the user, a file picker, or a prior artifact; do not invent paths.

block_key_poses.description: Block animator-style keyed transform poses for selected or named objects. Use this after create_timing_chart when you have concrete pose transforms. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

boolean_op.description: Add non-destructive Boolean modifiers to a target mesh using named cutter meshes or selected cutters. Use for difference, union, and intersect cuts before custom mesh scripts. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

cancel_external_asset_import_job.description: Cancel a queued external asset import job. Imports already running on Blender's main thread cannot be interrupted safely.

cancel_external_asset_job.description: Cancel an asynchronous external asset download/cache job. Subprocess jobs are terminated; in-process compatibility jobs stop cooperatively.

cancel_render_job.description: Cancel a tracked background render job started by this Blender bridge session.

capture_animation_playblast.description: Capture sampled low-resolution viewport frames across an animation range and return playblast metadata plus MCP frame resource URIs for visual animation review. Defaults to preview quality capped at 640x360; request quality/max_width/max_height only when higher fidelity is needed. Requires an interactive Blender window and fails soft in background mode. This is synchronous and roughly 1 second per sampled frame; if it times out, wait and check blender_bridge_status/latest playblast metadata before recapturing.
capture_animation_playblast.duration_hint: Synchronous viewport capture; rough estimate is about 1 second per sampled frame, with the default 12 low-resolution preview frames often around 10-20 seconds on large scenes.

brief.description: Short animation intent or prompt contract to store with the playblast metadata.

max_bytes.description: Maximum PNG bytes per sampled frame after resizing/compression.

max_frames.description: Maximum sampled frames to capture from the animation range. Defaults to 12.

max_height.description: Optional maximum stored frame height. Overrides the quality preset.

max_width.description: Optional maximum stored frame width. Overrides the quality preset.

quality.description: Frame-size preset. Defaults to preview/low at 640x360; source/original keeps viewport dimensions.

shading.description: Optional viewport shading for the capture. Defaults to the current viewport; use MATERIAL or RENDERED to review materials and lighting instead of flat solid shading.

timeout_recovery.message: If the MCP client times out, the playblast may still finish. Wait, check bridge status, then read latest playblast metadata or audit logs before recapturing.

capture_object_inspection_renders.description: Render diagnostic close-up PNGs of named objects from bounded inspection views, then return metadata plus MCP image resource URIs. Use when visual object details need rendered evidence, such as undersides, side views, occluded parts, or model defects. This is synchronous and may take a few seconds per object/view; if it times out, wait and check blender_bridge_status/latest inspection-render metadata before recapturing.
capture_object_inspection_renders.duration_hint: Synchronous still renders; rough estimate is a few seconds per object/view at 800x600 and more for heavy scenes or high resolutions.

distance_factor.description: Camera distance as a multiple of target bounding radius. Defaults to 3.

frame.description: Frame to render. Defaults to the current frame.

lens.description: Temporary camera lens in mm. Defaults to 50.

note.description: Short reason stored in the render metadata.

object_names.description: Objects or root objects to render. Children are included when computing bounds.

views.description: Diagnostic view names. Defaults to front_below and side.

timeout_recovery.message: If the MCP client times out, inspection renders may still finish. Wait, check bridge status, then read latest inspection-render metadata or audit logs before rerendering.

capture_viewport.description: Capture the current Blender viewport/window and return visual context metadata plus a local artifact path. Use when an external agent needs explicit screenshot evidence or MCP-readable image resources.

max_bytes.description: Maximum PNG bytes to keep after resizing/compression. Defaults to the add-on preference.

clear_animation.description: Clear object, data, shape-key, and optionally material animation from selected or named objects. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

commit_preview.description: Commit the current live preview transaction.

compare_animation_to_brief.description: Compare current animation samples and framing against a structured animation brief or prompt.

configure_render_outputs.description: Enable or disable ViewLayer render passes and configure shader AOVs. Use this for render-pass, cryptomatte, depth/normal/AO, or custom AOV requests before custom compositor/render Python. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

disabled_passes.description: Pass aliases to turn off; unsupported names are reported as warnings.

enabled_passes.description: Pass aliases such as normal, depth/z, ambient_occlusion/ao, cryptomatte_object, diffuse_color, vector, uv, shadow, emit, and environment.

create_2d_cutout_layer.description: Create a flat 2D cutout layer with optional transform keyframes and label text. Use for motion graphics, animatics, and cutout animation. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

create_animation_brief.description: Create a structured animation prompt contract with subjects, action, timing, assumptions, ambiguities, success criteria, and validation checks. Does not mutate the scene.

action.description: Optional explicit primary action if the prompt is ambiguous.

camera.description: Optional camera name or framing requirement.

prompt.description: The user's animation request or concise animation intent to formalize.

style.description: Optional style/read such as playful, heavy, snappy, or cinematic.

subject_names.description: Optional existing Blender object names to treat as animated subjects. Defaults to the current selection.

create_basic_armature.description: Create a simple one-bone armature object. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

create_camera_dolly_animation.description: Create a camera dolly/shot move with location keyframes, optional target tracking, and optional lens keyframes. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

create_camera_orbit.description: Create a camera orbit rig around a target object and keyframe it over a frame range. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

create_collection.description: Create or find a collection in the current scene. Applies immediately with preview revert support for newly created collections.

create_curve_path.description: Create a 3D poly curve path from points with optional bevel and material. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

create_directed_animation_shot.description: Create a reversible director-style animation shot template: camera push reveal, orbit reveal, product turntable, path slide, staggered reveal, storyboard dolly, crane reveal, or truck slide.

create_empty.description: Create an empty helper object with transform and display settings. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

create_follow_path_animation.description: Animate an object along an existing curve or a new curve built from path points. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

create_image_texture_material.description: Create or update a Principled BSDF material from exact local image/PBR map paths such as base color, roughness, metallic, normal, alpha, emission, AO, packed ARM/ORM, or bump. Optionally assigns it to selected or named mesh objects and applies immediately with preview revert support.
create_image_texture_material.path_policy: Use exact local image paths supplied by the user, a file picker, or a prior asset/cache tool; do not invent paths.

create_lookdev_turntable_review.description: Create a bounded look-dev review setup around a target: optional stage, turntable animation, render engine/quality controls, inspection still capture, and artifact validation. Applies scene changes with preview revert support while render evidence remains as MCP resources.

create_material_palette.description: Create a bounded production material palette, optional swatch cubes, and optional assignment to selected mesh objects. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

create_motion_arc.description: Create preview curve objects from sampled object locations so motion arcs are visible in the scene. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

create_new_blender_project.description: Create a new Blender project folder and .blend file at a user-confirmed path. This replaces the active Blender session, so confirm_discard_current and user_confirmed_path must be true; creates a checkpoint first by default.
create_new_blender_project.duration_hint: Usually seconds. The active Blender session is replaced by a fresh startup scene and immediately saved.

confirm_discard_current.description: Required true; new project replaces the active session.

create_checkpoint.description: Save a checkpoint before creating the new project. Defaults to true.

create_dirs.description: Create the project directory if missing. Defaults to true.

create_standard_dirs.description: Create assets, refs, renders, and exports folders. Defaults to true.

overwrite.description: Allow replacing an existing target .blend file.

project_dir.description: Parent or final project directory. Required unless filepath is supplied.

project_name.description: Project name used for folder/filename when filepath is omitted.

require_checkpoint.description: Abort if checkpoint creation fails. Defaults to true.

user_confirmed_path.description: Required true. Set only after the user provides the project_dir or filepath.

create_new_blender_project.path_policy: The project_dir or filepath must come from the user or a file picker, and user_confirmed_path plus confirm_discard_current must both be true.

timeout_recovery.message: If new-project creation times out, wait, call blender_bridge_status, then check get_blend_file_diagnostics and the target project folder before retrying.

create_primitive.description: Create a mesh primitive in the current scene. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

create_procedural_object_kit.description: Create a reversible procedural object kit from bounded templates such as kitbash towers, radial arrays, scatter grids, product stacks, product display rigs, desk lamps, coffee machines, mechanical joints, mechanical assemblies, control panels, studio prop sets, mechanical parts, modular wall panels, or pipe runs. Supports bounded design-grammar controls for style, variant, detail level, and semantic features, so use it before custom mesh or geometry-node scripts.

features.description: Bounded semantic feature hints. Currently used by desk_lamp.

style.description: Bounded visual style palette. Explicit colors override palette defaults.

variant.description: Template-specific bounded design variant. Currently used by desk_lamp.

create_procedural_texture_material.description: Create or update a bounded procedural Principled material using noise, voronoi, wave, or checker texture nodes with optional ColorRamp and bump. Use this for procedural stone, marble, wood, cellular, fabric, or musgrave-style texture requests before custom shader-node Python.

create_product_turntable_setup.description: Create a product turntable setup around a target: optional stage, rotating target animation, and orbit camera. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

create_progressive_bounce_animation.description: Create repeated bounce keyframes plus decreasing scale keys for one object. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

create_pulse_animation.description: Create a scale pulse and optional emission-strength pulse for an object. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

create_reveal_animation.description: Create a scale reveal and optional material alpha fade. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

create_shader_material.description: Create or update a Principled BSDF material from explicit values or bounded presets such as brushed metal, brushed chrome, painted enamel, matte plastic, clear glass, emissive accent, or matte ceramic. Optionally assigns it to selected mesh objects and applies immediately with preview revert support.

create_shape_key.description: Create or update a shape key value on a mesh object. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

create_staggered_motion.description: Create staggered location animation across selected or named objects. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

create_storyboard_panels.description: Create a reversible 2D storyboard/animatic board with panel cards, borders, shot labels, frame ranges, and optional orthographic camera. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

create_studio_product_stage.description: Create a production-style product presentation stage around a target object: floor, backdrop, key/fill/rim area lights, target empty, and optional camera. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

lighting_warning.description: Set when stacking lights onto an already-lit scene may over-expose the render; empty otherwise.

create_text_object.description: Create a text object with transform, alignment, size, and optional simple material. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

create_timing_chart.description: Create a read-only animator-style timing chart from a prompt or animation brief, with key poses, contacts, holds, breakdowns, and spacing notes.

create_turntable_animation.description: Create a simple rotating product/object turntable animation. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

create_wheel_assembly.description: Create a tire and rim wheel assembly at a location. Useful for vehicle detailing. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

curve_to_mesh.description: Create mesh-copy objects from selected or named Curve/Text objects without destroying the source. Optionally hides the source. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

delete_external_asset_job.description: Delete completed, failed, or cancelled external asset job metadata/log files. Dry-run by default.

distribute_selected_objects.description: Evenly distribute selected object locations along one axis between existing or provided start/end positions. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

download_poly_haven_asset.description: Synchronous fallback: download and cache selected Poly Haven HDRI, texture, or model files with checksum validation. Does not mutate the Blender scene. For normal client workflows, prefer start_external_asset_download and poll get_external_asset_job_status.

download_sketchfab_model.description: Synchronous fallback: use a Sketchfab API token to fetch temporary GLTF download info, cache the archive, and extract an importable model file. Does not mutate the Blender scene. For normal client workflows, prefer start_external_asset_download and poll get_external_asset_job_status.

api_token.description: Optional per-call Sketchfab API token. Redacted in audit logs.

token_env_var.description: Sketchfab API token environment variable to read when api_token is omitted. Defaults to SKETCHFAB_API_TOKEN and falls back to the bridge-specific name.

draft_privileged_script.approval_policy: Requires the binary Blender-side Trust Agent Scripts session control.
draft_privileged_script.description: Compatibility alias for draft_script. Under active Blender-side session trust it runs generated Python with the same process permissions as Blender's Run Script command; otherwise it refuses.
draft_privileged_script.duration_hint: Synchronous trusted Python may finish in seconds or keep Blender busy indefinitely, depending on the script.

approval_summary.description: Legacy compatibility field retained as advisory context; it does not authorize execution

capabilities.description: Legacy capability declaration retained as advisory context; active session trust grants full manual-script permissions.

code.description: Complete Blender Python script to run under active session trust

declared_paths.description: Files, directories, cache locations, or .blend paths the script may read/write/open/save

declared_urls.description: Network URLs, API endpoints, providers, or asset sources the script may contact

destructive_actions.description: Expected overwrite, open, delete, import, save, or discard operations. Use an empty list only when none are expected.

expected_changes.description: Visible scene, file, asset-cache, or project-file changes expected when it runs

intent.description: Plain-language reason for the privileged script

risk_level.description: Risk estimate based on file/network/project impact. Defaults to high.

script_kind.description: Legacy workflow classification retained for client compatibility and audit context.

target_objects.description: Object or datablock names the script intends to touch

draft_privileged_script.recovery_hint: Use checkpoints, Blender undo, or bounded structured tools when stronger recovery is needed.

timeout_recovery.message: If trusted Python times out, wait, call blender_bridge_status, inspect visual evidence and the audit log, and rerun only if no result or side effect appeared.

draft_script.description: Run Blender Python immediately with the same process permissions as Blender's Run Script command when Blender-side session script trust is active. Filesystem, network, subprocess, project-file, and Blender API access are allowed. When trust is off the request is refused without staging a pending script. Prefer bounded helpers when they provide better recovery or progress reporting.
draft_script.duration_hint: Synchronous trusted Python may finish in seconds or keep Blender busy indefinitely, depending on the script.

code.description: Complete Blender Python script to run under active session trust

expected_changes.description: Visible scene/data changes the user should expect if they approve it

risk_level.description: Risk estimate based on scope, destructiveness, and API uncertainty

target_objects.description: Object or datablock names the script intends to touch

timeout_recovery.message: If trusted Python times out, wait, call blender_bridge_status, inspect visual evidence and the audit log, and rerun only if no result or side effect appeared.

duplicate_selected_objects.description: Duplicate selected objects with optional unique data, offset, animation copy, and selecting the new duplicates. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

edit_mesh.description: Apply one bounded destructive mesh edit to selected or named single-user mesh objects with mesh-data snapshot rollback. Supports face extrusion, face inset, bounded planar loop cut, planar knife cut, boundary-loop bridge, dissolve-degenerate, merge-by-distance, and proportional vertex edit.

cut_axis.description: Plane normal axis for knife_cut and loop_cut.

loop_cuts.description: Number of evenly spaced loop planes for loop_cut.

focus_object_in_viewport.description: Frame a named object in the first 3D viewport and optionally select it. Requires an interactive Blender UI and fails soft in background mode.

select.description: Select and activate the object before focusing. Defaults to true.

get_2d_animation_details.description: Inspect 2D/storyboard context: Grease Pencil-like objects, text, curves, flat mesh layers, camera, timeline, render, and compositor status. Does not mutate the scene.

get_animation_details.description: Fetch read-only scene, object, action, f-curve, and keyframe details for animation planning.

max_keyframes_per_curve.description: Maximum keyframes to show per f-curve

object_names.description: Optional object names whose actions should be inspected

get_animation_scene_context.description: Build read-only animation-aware scene context that identifies likely edit targets, rig-driven objects, rig control candidates, shape keys, constraints, drivers, NLA, physics/simulation hints, contact surfaces, camera readiness, hardening risk flags, required pre-mutation inspections, and recommended deeper inspection/review tools.

object_names.description: Optional objects to inspect. Defaults to the scene unless selected_only is true.

selected_only.description: Inspect only selected objects when object_names is empty.

get_blend_file_diagnostics.description: Inspect blend-file health: saved path, dirty state, backups, missing external files, linked libraries, and data-block usage summaries.

max_items.description: Maximum external file/library entries to return.

get_collection_layer_details.description: Fetch read-only collection tree, collection membership, visibility flags, and view-layer pass summaries.

get_curve_text_details.description: Fetch read-only curve and text object data including splines, bevels, text body preview, alignment, and materials.

get_external_asset_cache_diagnostics.description: Report cached/imported external assets, providers, licenses, source URLs, files, and imported Blender data-block names.

get_external_asset_import_job_status.description: Poll a queued external asset import job for queued/running/completed/failed/cancelled status and import result details. Use this after start_external_asset_import_job before reporting import success.

get_external_asset_job_status.description: Poll an asynchronous external asset download/cache job for status, progress, cached manifest path, and import readiness. When completed and the user wants scene import, call start_external_asset_import_job.

get_geometry_nodes_details.description: Fetch read-only Geometry Nodes modifier and node-group summaries for named objects or all objects with Geometry Nodes.

get_material_node_details.description: Fetch read-only material node and link details for named or selected-object materials.

selected_only.description: Use materials on selected objects when material_names is empty

get_object_details.description: Fetch deeper read-only details for named objects, selected objects, or the active object.

selected_only.description: Inspect current selected objects when object_names is empty

get_render_camera_compositor_details.description: Fetch read-only render settings, active camera settings, world settings, and compositor node summaries.

get_render_job_status.description: Poll a background render job for status, frame progress, output paths, latest frame resource URI, log tail, and completion state.

get_rig_pose_library_details.description: Inspect rig-compatible pose-library/action candidates for an armature, including pose markers, matched bones/channels, frame ranges, and suggested apply calls. Use before applying production rig poses or clips.

get_rigging_details.description: Fetch read-only armature, bone, pose-bone, constraint, and driver summaries.

get_shader_nodes_details.description: Fetch read-only shader node-tree, node, link, and driver summaries for materials.

get_shape_key_details.description: Fetch read-only mesh shape key blocks, values, ranges, relative keys, and shape-key drivers.

get_simulation_details.description: Fetch read-only rigid-body, particle, point-cache, and simulation bake summaries for cloth, fluid, soft body, dynamic paint, and particles.

get_visual_evidence_resources.description: Return a compact inventory of latest MCP-readable viewport captures, playblasts, inspection renders, render thumbnails, and render jobs. Use when an agent needs to know what visual/render evidence exists and which resource URIs can be read.

include_unavailable.description: Include resource families with no latest artifact yet. Defaults to true.

get_workspace_layout.description: Return JSON for Blender workspaces, windows, screens, and UI areas. Use before workspace/view navigation or UI diagnostics.

import_external_asset_job_result.description: Synchronous fallback: import a completed external asset download/cache job result into Blender preview using the cached manifest. For normal client workflows, prefer start_external_asset_import_job and poll get_external_asset_import_job_status.

import_poly_haven_asset.description: Synchronous fallback: download/cache and import a Poly Haven asset into Blender preview. HDRIs create a world, textures create/assign a material, and models use Blender importers. For normal client workflows, use start_external_asset_download, poll get_external_asset_job_status, then start_external_asset_import_job.

allow_duplicate.description: Allow another overlapping copy when this asset is already present.

import_sketchfab_model.description: Synchronous fallback: use a Sketchfab API token to cache a downloadable model archive and import the extracted GLTF/GLB file into Blender preview. For normal client workflows, use start_external_asset_download, poll get_external_asset_job_status, then start_external_asset_import_job.

allow_duplicate.description: Allow another overlapping copy when this asset is already present.

api_token.description: Optional per-call Sketchfab API token. Redacted in audit logs.

token_env_var.description: Sketchfab API token environment variable to read when api_token is omitted. Defaults to SKETCHFAB_API_TOKEN and falls back to the bridge-specific name.

inspect_material_setup.description: Read-only material quality gate for texture image files, PBR map color spaces, shader graph links, and UV map assignments. Use before repair or render signoff for textured materials.

inspect_modeling_quality.description: Read-only modeling quality diagnostic for mesh objects. Reports topology, loose/non-manifold geometry, material readiness, modifier seed warnings, unapplied scale warnings, and pass/fail status. Use before custom modeling repair scripts or as an exit-test gate.

inspect_poly_haven_asset_files.description: Fetch and summarize the available Poly Haven files for one asset, including resolutions, formats, sizes, hashes, and include dependencies. Does not download or import.

inspect_scene.description: Inspect the current Blender scene and selected objects. Use before acting if context may be stale.

include_visual.description: Whether viewport image context was requested

inspect_simulation_bake.description: Sample evaluated simulation state across a bounded frame range and report cache/bake readiness without mutating persistent point caches.

inspect_uv_layout.description: Read-only UV layout quality gate for missing UVs, near-zero area, possible overlapping face bounds, seam counts, layout stats, and unapplied-scale warnings. max_overlap_pairs=0 disables the overlap heuristic.

jump_to_workspace.description: Switch the active Blender window to a named workspace/tab. Requires an interactive Blender UI and fails soft in background mode.

link_selected_to_collection.description: Link selected objects to a named collection without deleting existing links. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

list_poly_haven_categories.description: List Poly Haven catalog categories for HDRIs, textures, and models. Returns metadata only; it does not download or import assets.

timeout.description: HTTP timeout in seconds. Defaults to 15.

list_project_files.description: List files and folders beneath the directory containing the current saved .blend. Hidden paths and links are not traversed; unsaved projects are refused.

max_entries.description: Maximum entries to return, from 1 to 1000.

recursive.description: Recursively list ordinary subdirectories. Defaults to false.

relative_path.description: Optional relative project subdirectory. Absolute, parent, and hidden paths are rejected.

list_project_files.path_policy: Only relative paths contained by the directory of the current saved .blend are accepted. Absolute paths, parent traversal, hidden components, symbolic links, and reparse points are blocked.

list_scene_objects.description: List objects in the current scene with names, types, selection state, visibility, collections, and locations.

type_filter.description: Optional Blender object type such as MESH, CAMERA, LIGHT, EMPTY

mark_uv_seams.description: Mark or clear preview-safe UV seams on mesh objects using bounded boundary and face-angle rules. Use before uv_unwrap when the user asks for seams, hard-edge seams, or texture-ready unwrap preparation.

mirror_model.description: Add non-destructive Mirror modifiers to selected or named mesh objects, with optional mirror object, bisect axes, clipping, and merge settings. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

offset_rig_limb_controls.description: Apply small keyed offsets to named IK/FK/pole limb controls and optionally key existing space-switch properties. Use for targeted rig contact, support, and limb-space repair after rig inspection. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

open_blend_file.description: Open an existing user-confirmed .blend file. This replaces the active Blender session, so confirm_discard_current and user_confirmed_path must be true; creates a checkpoint first by default.
open_blend_file.duration_hint: Usually seconds, but large .blend files can take longer. The active Blender session is replaced.

confirm_discard_current.description: Required true; opening replaces the active session.

create_checkpoint.description: Save a checkpoint before opening. Defaults to true.

load_ui.description: Load UI layout from the opened file when supported. Defaults to false.

require_checkpoint.description: Abort if checkpoint creation fails. Defaults to true.

user_confirmed_path.description: Required true. Set only after the user provides the filepath.

open_blend_file.path_policy: The filepath must come from the user or a file picker, and user_confirmed_path plus confirm_discard_current must both be true.

timeout_recovery.message: If opening times out, wait, call blender_bridge_status, then check get_blend_file_diagnostics before opening another file.

organize_scene_for_production.description: Link scene or selected objects into production-oriented type collections without deleting original links. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

parent_selected_to_empty.description: Create an empty at named or selected objects' center or a provided location, then parent those objects to it while preserving world transforms. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

plan_advanced_scene_workflow.description: Plan a helper-first workflow for advanced 3D, 2D/storyboard, animation, simulation, asset import, compositor/render, and script-fallback work. Does not mutate the scene.

plan_animation_workflow.description: Plan the Milestone 7 animation workflow for generation, review, or repair. Returns a brief, animation-aware scene context, timing chart, ordered helper/evaluator/repair tool calls, and explicit draft_script fallback rules. Does not mutate the scene.

findings.description: Optional evaluator findings to plan repair calls.

mode.description: Workflow focus. full includes generation and validation guidance.

prompt.description: The user's animation generation, review, or repair request.

subject_names.description: Optional existing Blender object names to treat as animated subjects.

plan_asset_import_workflow.description: Plan the async external-asset discovery, download/cache, queued import, post-import organization, staging, and visual-evidence workflow. Does not mutate the scene.

plan_director_workflow.description: Plan a multi-step director workflow across inspection, optional asset import, creation, animation/review/repair, evidence capture, and commit/revert decision points. Does not mutate the scene.

plan_object_design.description: Map a natural-language object design brief to object family, creation strategy, bounded object-kit arguments, helper tools, asset-reference boundaries, and script fallback policy. Use before choosing procedural kits or custom scripts for open-ended object creation. Does not mutate the scene.

prepare_imported_asset_presentation.description: Organize imported asset objects, fill missing mesh materials without overwriting imported materials, create a bounded studio/turntable presentation setup, and leave the result in preview. Use after an external asset import job completes.

lighting_warning.description: Set when stacking lights onto an already-lit scene may over-expose the render; empty otherwise.

prune_external_asset_cache.description: Preview or delete old/excess external asset cache directories by age or total size. Dry-run by default.

read_project_file.description: Read a bounded UTF-8 or base64 file beneath the directory containing the current saved .blend. Reads are capped at 4 MiB and cannot follow hidden paths or links.

max_bytes.description: Maximum bytes to read, capped at 4194304.

relative_path.description: Relative path beneath the saved .blend directory.

read_project_file.path_policy: Only relative paths contained by the directory of the current saved .blend are accepted. Absolute paths, parent traversal, hidden components, symbolic links, and reparse points are blocked.

render_scene_thumbnail.description: Render a small PNG from the scene camera or a named camera, then return metadata plus exact MCP image resource URIs. Use for render evidence, thumbnails, and client-readable still output. Large synchronous renders are guarded; use start_render_job for timeout-safe high-resolution output.
render_scene_thumbnail.duration_hint: Small guarded still renders are usually seconds. Large synchronous renders are blocked by default; use start_render_job for timeout-safe high-resolution output.

allow_blocking_render.description: Allow a large synchronous still render. Defaults to false; large previews should use start_render_job.

camera_name.description: Optional camera object name. Defaults to active scene camera.

filepath.description: Optional PNG output path. Defaults to the project/session capture cache.

frame.description: Frame to render. Defaults to current frame.

note.description: Short reason stored in thumbnail metadata.

timeout_recovery.message: If the MCP client times out, wait, check bridge status, then inspect latest render-thumbnail metadata or use start_render_job for a timeout-safe rerun.

repair_animation_from_findings.description: Turn structured animation findings into focused repair operations with suggested helper tool arguments and executable tool_call name/input pairs. Does not mutate the scene.

repair_material_setup.description: Repair bounded material setup issues by fixing image texture color spaces and relinking image texture vector inputs to a known UV map. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

retime_actions.description: Scale existing action keyframes into a new frame range. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

revert_preview.description: Revert the full live preview transaction, or remove only the latest isolated imported-asset step.

scope.description: Defaults to all. last_step is accepted only for an isolated creation step such as an asset import.

review_inspection_renders_against_brief.description: Review diagnostic object render evidence against a prompt contract. Returns visual-detail findings and repair_operations, including focused recapture calls when views or image evidence are missing.
review_inspection_renders_against_brief.duration_hint: Normally a few seconds. Oversized image batches are pixel-budgeted and may skip extra image inspection to keep the bridge responsive.

timeout_recovery.message: If review times out, wait for the bridge to become responsive, inspect the latest inspection-render metadata/audit log, and rerun with fewer or smaller images if needed.

review_playblast_against_brief.description: Review playblast visual frame evidence, compact pixel motion evidence, and current animation state against a prompt contract. Returns structured findings and repair_operations with executable tool_call name/input pairs.
review_playblast_against_brief.duration_hint: Normally a few seconds. Oversized image batches are pixel-budgeted and may skip extra frame inspection to keep the bridge responsive.

timeout_recovery.message: If review times out, wait for the bridge to become responsive, inspect the latest playblast metadata/audit log, and rerun with fewer or smaller frames if needed.

run_animation_repair_loop.description: Apply a bounded set of animation repair_operations through safe helper tools, optionally recapture playblast evidence, and re-run review_playblast_against_brief. May leave preview changes pending for commit/revert.
run_animation_repair_loop.duration_hint: Usually seconds to a minute depending on repair count and whether playblast recapture is enabled.

allowed_tools.description: Optional allowlist of repair helper tool names for this loop.

apply_mutating_repairs.description: Whether to execute preview-safe mutating repair helpers. Defaults to true.

max_operations.description: Maximum helper operations to execute. Defaults to 4.

recapture_after_mutation.description: Whether to request a fresh playblast after mutating repairs before final review. Defaults to true.

timeout_recovery.message: If the client times out, wait briefly, check bridge status, then inspect visual evidence resources and audit logs before rerunning repairs.

run_animation_task.description: One-input animation entry point for MCP clients. Routes the prompt through the Milestone 7 planner/runner workflow before any draft_script fallback.
run_animation_task.duration_hint: Usually seconds for helper-backed animation; can take longer when the workflow captures or reviews visual evidence.

prompt.description: The user's animation generation, review, or repair request.

timeout_recovery.message: If the client times out, wait briefly, check bridge status, then inspect visual evidence resources and audit logs before rerunning.

run_animation_workflow.description: Execute the Milestone 7 helper-backed animation workflow for common requests, then run structured review and optional bounded repair. May leave live preview changes pending for commit/revert.
run_animation_workflow.duration_hint: Usually seconds for helper-only animation; can take longer when capture_playblast or repair recapture is enabled.

apply_generation.description: Whether to execute allowlisted generation helpers from the workflow. Defaults to true.

apply_repairs.description: Whether to execute bounded repair operations from evaluator findings. Defaults to false.

capture_playblast.description: Whether to request sampled viewport frames during review. Defaults to false for headless-safe use.

prompt.description: The user's animation generation, review, or repair request.

run_review.description: Whether to run structured evaluator review after generation. Defaults to true.

timeout_recovery.message: If the client times out, wait briefly, check bridge status, then inspect visual evidence resources and audit logs before rerunning.

run_approved_script.description: Compatibility endpoint that refuses removed per-script approval flows.

approval_token.description: Ignored legacy field. This endpoint always returns per_script_approval_removed and never authorizes execution.

sample_animation_state.description: Sample selected or named object transforms across an animation range for objective review.

save_blend_file.description: Save the current .blend, save-as to a human-confirmed .blend path, or save a copy without changing the active file. Refuses accidental overwrite unless overwrite=true.
save_blend_file.duration_hint: Usually seconds, but large .blend files or network paths can take longer. The current file path changes only when copy=false and filepath targets a different .blend.

copy.description: Save a copy without changing the active filepath. Requires filepath.

create_dirs.description: Create the target directory if missing. Defaults to true.

filepath.description: Optional .blend path. Omit to save the active file.

overwrite.description: Allow replacing an existing target .blend file.

user_confirmed_path.description: Required true for save-as/save-copy. Set only after the user provides the filepath.

save_blend_file.path_policy: Saving the active bound .blend may omit filepath. Any save-as or save-copy filepath must come from the user and set user_confirmed_path=true.

timeout_recovery.message: If saving times out, wait, call blender_bridge_status, then check get_blend_file_diagnostics and the target file before retrying.

screw_model.description: Add non-destructive Screw modifiers to selected or named mesh objects for rotational forms, spirals, springs, threads, and screw-depth modeling. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

search_blender_docs.description: Search cached/official Blender docs. Use before unfamiliar or version-sensitive APIs.

search_poly_haven_assets.description: Search Poly Haven's CC0 asset catalog and return source URLs plus API file URLs. Returns metadata only; it does not download or import assets.

limit.description: Maximum assets to return. Defaults to 20, max 50.

query.description: Optional local text filter over returned asset names, ids, and categories.

timeout.description: HTTP timeout in seconds. Defaults to 15.

search_sketchfab_models.description: Search Sketchfab's public model catalog and return viewer, author, license, thumbnail, and downloadability metadata. Returns metadata only; it does not download or import assets.

downloadable.description: Filter for downloadable models. Defaults to true.

limit.description: Maximum models to return. Defaults to 20, max 50.

timeout.description: HTTP timeout in seconds. Defaults to 15.

select_objects.description: Select named objects and optionally set the active object. Use before selected-object helper tools when needed.

extend.description: Keep existing selection instead of replacing it

set_action_interpolation.description: Set keyframe interpolation and optional easing for named actions or object-owned actions. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

set_active_camera.description: Set an existing camera object as the active scene camera. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

set_animation_preview_range.description: Set scene preview playback range and optionally move the playhead. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

set_camera_settings.description: Set camera lens, sensor width, and depth-of-field settings. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

set_current_frame.description: Set the current scene frame/playhead for inspection or preview.

set_object_display.description: Set object viewport display type, name/wire/in-front flags, display color, and empty display settings. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

set_object_visibility.description: Set viewport, render, or selection visibility flags for named or selected objects. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

set_pose_hold.description: Duplicate a keyed pose for a hold so contact, staging, or hero poses read before polish. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

set_render_engine.description: Set the render engine plus optional look-dev preset, samples, denoise, and color-management controls. Use this for explicit engine/quality requests; use set_render_settings when resolution or timeline settings also change.

set_render_settings.description: Set render engine, resolution, FPS, frame range, transparency, look-dev quality preset, samples, denoise, and color management. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

set_rig_custom_property_keyframes.description: Key existing scalar rig custom properties, such as IK/FK or space switches, over a short hold window. Use only for properties found by rig inspection or repair metadata. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

set_rig_pose_hold.description: Duplicate pose-bone transforms on named armature control bones for a hold. Use for rig-driven characters/props after inspecting rig controls. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

set_scene_frame_range.description: Set the scene timeline frame range, current frame, and optionally FPS. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

set_selected_location_delta.description: Move selected Blender objects by a delta in Blender units. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

delta.description: [x, y, z] movement delta in Blender units

set_selected_transform.description: Set absolute transform values on selected Blender objects. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

location.description: Optional absolute [x, y, z] location in Blender units

rotation.description: Optional absolute Euler rotation in radians

set_viewport_view.description: Set the first 3D viewport to an axis, camera, or user view and optionally frame an object. Requires an interactive Blender UI and fails soft in background mode.

frame_object_name.description: Optional object to frame after changing view.

use_orthographic.description: Use orthographic axis views when possible. Defaults to true.

set_world_background.description: Set the scene world background color. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

shade_smooth_selected.description: Shade selected mesh polygons smooth and optionally add a Weighted Normal modifier. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

solidify_model.description: Add non-destructive Solidify modifiers to selected or named mesh objects for wall thickness, shells, panels, or flat cutout depth. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

stage_persistent_simulation_bake.approval_policy: Requires active binary session trust and then runs immediately.
stage_persistent_simulation_bake.description: Inspect the requested simulation scope, then run a fixed-template scene-wide persistent point-cache bake when Blender-side session script trust is active. Trust off refuses without staging.
stage_persistent_simulation_bake.duration_hint: Synchronous scene-wide simulation baking may take from seconds to hours and can keep Blender unavailable while it runs.

auto_run_if_trusted.description: Deprecated compatibility option. Active session trust always runs immediately; trust off always refuses.

stage_persistent_simulation_bake.recovery_hint: If Blender becomes unreachable after a trusted bake, wait, call blender_bridge_status, then use get_blend_file_diagnostics before reporting any checkpoint path.

timeout_recovery.message: If baking times out, wait before calling blender_bridge_status and get_blend_file_diagnostics; do not rerun while the original bake may still be active.

start_external_asset_download.description: Default client path: start an asynchronous external asset download/cache job for Poly Haven or Sketchfab. Use this for any normal asset download/cache or import request. Returns immediately with a job id; poll get_external_asset_job_status until completed or failed, then queue scene import with start_external_asset_import_job.
start_external_asset_download.duration_hint: Returns quickly; the background asset job may continue downloading, extracting, and validating cache files. Poll get_external_asset_job_status until completed or failed before starting a queued import.

api_token.description: Optional per-call Sketchfab API token. Redacted in audit logs and not persisted to job metadata.

token_env_var.description: Sketchfab API token environment variable to read when api_token is omitted.

timeout_recovery.message: If startup times out, check bridge status and then poll get_external_asset_job_status before starting another asset job.

start_external_asset_import_job.description: Default client path after a completed asset download/cache job: queue Blender main-thread import and return immediately with a pollable import job id. Poll get_external_asset_import_job_status until completed or failed.
start_external_asset_import_job.duration_hint: Returns quickly; the queued import runs later on Blender's main thread and may briefly keep Blender busy while importers execute. Poll get_external_asset_import_job_status until completed or failed before reporting success.

manifest_path.description: Optional cached asset manifest path when no source_job_id is supplied.

source_job_id.description: Completed external asset download/cache job id.

timeout_recovery.message: If startup times out, check bridge status and then poll get_external_asset_import_job_status before starting another import job.

start_render_job.description: Start a long-running render or playblast job in a background Blender process and return immediately with a job id, rough ETA, and polling guidance. Auto quality keeps final renders high quality but defaults playblast/preview/review/draft jobs to low resolution unless quality or resolution is specified. Use for 1080p/4K, high-sample, full-frame-range renders, frame sequences, or MP4 quality checks instead of blocking render tools or draft_script.
start_render_job.duration_hint: Returns quickly, then the background render may run from seconds to hours. Use the returned estimated_duration and poll_after_seconds.

camera_name.description: Optional camera object to render from. Timeline camera markers still work when no camera is passed.

output_kind.description: Use frames for PNG sequences with progress counts, or video/mp4 for direct MP4 output.

quality.description: Defaulting profile when resolution/samples are omitted. Auto uses low-res for playblast/preview/review/draft jobs and final-quality defaults otherwise.

resolution_x.description: Output width. Defaults to auto quality profile: 640 for playblast/preview/review jobs, 1920 for final renders.

resolution_y.description: Output height. Defaults to auto quality profile: 360 for playblast/preview/review jobs, 1080 for final renders.

samples.description: Cycles/Eevee render samples. Defaults to auto quality profile: low for playblast/preview/review jobs, higher for final renders.

timeout_recovery.message: If startup times out, check bridge status and latest render-job metadata before starting another job.

symmetrize_model.description: Add a non-destructive symmetry Mirror modifier to selected or named mesh objects on one axis. Use for quick left/right, front/back, or top/bottom symmetry before destructive mesh scripts. Applies immediately with preview revert support.

uv_unwrap.description: Create or update preview-safe UV coordinate maps on mesh objects using bounded deterministic smart, cube, or planar projection. Applies immediately with mesh-data preview rollback.

validate_render_job_output.description: Validate render job frame completeness, MP4 presence/size, and useful output resource URIs before reporting a render as done.

min_video_size_bytes.description: Minimum acceptable MP4 size. Defaults to 1 byte.

require_video.description: Require MP4 output. Defaults to true.

write_project_file.description: Create or replace a bounded UTF-8 or base64 file beneath the directory containing the current saved .blend. Parent folders may be created; executable/script/library and .blend targets are blocked.

content.description: UTF-8 text or base64 content. Decoded content is capped at 4 MiB.

create_dirs.description: Create ordinary parent directories. Defaults to true.

overwrite.description: Replace an existing file. Defaults to false.

relative_path.description: Relative output path beneath the saved .blend directory.

write_project_file.path_policy: Only relative paths contained by the directory of the current saved .blend are accepted. Absolute paths, parent traversal, hidden components, symbolic links, reparse points, executable or script targets, libraries, and .blend files are blocked.

definitions.description: Inspect the current Blender scene and selected objects. Use before acting if context may be stale.

include_visual.description: Whether viewport image context was requested

definitions.name: inspect_scene

definitions.description: Capture the current Blender viewport/window and return visual context metadata plus a local artifact path. Use when an external agent needs explicit screenshot evidence or MCP-readable image resources.

max_bytes.description: Maximum PNG bytes to keep after resizing/compression. Defaults to the add-on preference.

definitions.name: capture_viewport

definitions.description: Capture sampled low-resolution viewport frames across an animation range and return playblast metadata plus MCP frame resource URIs for visual animation review. Defaults to preview quality capped at 640x360; request quality/max_width/max_height only when higher fidelity is needed. Requires an interactive Blender window and fails soft in background mode. This is synchronous and roughly 1 second per sampled frame; if it times out, wait and check blender_bridge_status/latest playblast metadata before recapturing.

brief.description: Short animation intent or prompt contract to store with the playblast metadata.

max_bytes.description: Maximum PNG bytes per sampled frame after resizing/compression.

max_frames.description: Maximum sampled frames to capture from the animation range. Defaults to 12.

max_height.description: Optional maximum stored frame height. Overrides the quality preset.

max_width.description: Optional maximum stored frame width. Overrides the quality preset.

quality.description: Frame-size preset. Defaults to preview/low at 640x360; source/original keeps viewport dimensions.

shading.description: Optional viewport shading for the capture. Defaults to the current viewport; use MATERIAL or RENDERED to review materials and lighting instead of flat solid shading.

definitions.name: capture_animation_playblast

definitions.description: Render diagnostic close-up PNGs of named objects from bounded inspection views, then return metadata plus MCP image resource URIs. Use when visual object details need rendered evidence, such as undersides, side views, occluded parts, or model defects. This is synchronous and may take a few seconds per object/view; if it times out, wait and check blender_bridge_status/latest inspection-render metadata before recapturing.

distance_factor.description: Camera distance as a multiple of target bounding radius. Defaults to 3.

frame.description: Frame to render. Defaults to the current frame.

lens.description: Temporary camera lens in mm. Defaults to 50.

note.description: Short reason stored in the render metadata.

object_names.description: Objects or root objects to render. Children are included when computing bounds.

views.description: Diagnostic view names. Defaults to front_below and side.

definitions.name: capture_object_inspection_renders

definitions.description: Inspect blend-file health: saved path, dirty state, backups, missing external files, linked libraries, and data-block usage summaries.

max_items.description: Maximum external file/library entries to return.

definitions.name: get_blend_file_diagnostics

copy.description: Save a copy without changing the active filepath. Requires filepath.

create_dirs.description: Create the target directory if missing. Defaults to true.

filepath.description: Optional .blend path. Omit to save the active file.

overwrite.description: Allow replacing an existing target .blend file.

user_confirmed_path.description: Required true for save-as/save-copy. Set only after the user provides the filepath.

create_checkpoint.description: Save a checkpoint before opening. Defaults to true.

load_ui.description: Load UI layout from the opened file when supported. Defaults to false.

user_confirmed_path.description: Required true. Set only after the user provides the filepath.

definitions.name: open_blend_file

create_checkpoint.description: Save a checkpoint before creating the new project. Defaults to true.

create_dirs.description: Create the project directory if missing. Defaults to true.

create_standard_dirs.description: Create assets, refs, renders, and exports folders. Defaults to true.

overwrite.description: Allow replacing an existing target .blend file.

project_dir.description: Parent or final project directory. Required unless filepath is supplied.

project_name.description: Project name used for folder/filename when filepath is omitted.

require_checkpoint.description: Abort if checkpoint creation fails. Defaults to true.

user_confirmed_path.description: Required true. Set only after the user provides the project_dir or filepath.

definitions.name: create_new_blender_project

definitions.description: Autosave the current open .blend in place. It has no filepath argument and refuses unsaved scenes.

force.description: Save even when the file is not dirty, the interval has not elapsed, or live preview changes are pending. Defaults to false.

respect_enabled.description: Skip if the autosave preference is disabled. Defaults to false.

definitions.name: autosave_current_blend_file

definitions.description: List files and folders beneath the directory containing the current saved .blend. Hidden paths and links are not traversed; unsaved projects are refused.

max_entries.description: Maximum entries to return, from 1 to 1000.

recursive.description: Recursively list ordinary subdirectories. Defaults to false.

relative_path.description: Optional relative project subdirectory. Absolute, parent, and hidden paths are rejected.

definitions.name: list_project_files

definitions.description: Read a bounded UTF-8 or base64 file beneath the directory containing the current saved .blend. Reads are capped at 4 MiB and cannot follow hidden paths or links.

max_bytes.description: Maximum bytes to read, capped at 4194304.

relative_path.description: Relative path beneath the saved .blend directory.
